meaning: 波厄斯郡[英国威尔士郡名]
examples: Mr Scheuer, who was speaking at the Festival, in Hay-on-Wye, Powys, is a controversial figure in intelligence and political circles.
He continued to work as a freelance actor-teacher and playwright with both Big Brum TIE and Theatr Powys in Wales until 1999 when he became the Artistic Director of Big Brum.
In April, police in the Welsh town of Dyfed-Powys revealed that 14 UFO sightings had been reported in the past five years - as well as 26 ghosts, 11 witches, two zombies and two vampires.
And there have also been reports of snow on high ground in Powys overnight.
Powys council's cabinet will consider the recommendation to keep Carno open on 14 May.
